matters.title: Trade Union Dispute - Wage Restructuring Case
matters.description: Adjudication of industrial dispute under Section 10 of Industrial Disputes Act regarding wage revision, bonus structure adjustments, and shift modifications.

matters.title: GST ITC Reversal Dispute FY 22-23
matters.opponentParty: Assistant Commissioner of State Tax, West Bengal
matters.description: Appeal filed against the order of demand for reversal of Input Tax Credit on capital goods claiming mismatch under GSTR-2B.

matters.title: Bally Jute Raw Sourcing Agreement Non-Performance Claim
matters.courtOrAuthority: Arbitration Tribunal of Indian Jute Mills Association
matters.description: Arbitration proceedings initiated for recovery of advance payments and damages due to non-supply of requested quality of Tossa Raw Jute.

matters.title: Bally Jute Mill ESI Contribution Demand Appeal
matters.description: Appeal against the ad-hoc ESI contribution demand on contract laborers working during mill shutdown periods.

matters.title: Yashoda Real Estate Property Title Suit - Rajarhat Site
matters.courtOrAuthority: Civil Judge Senior Division, Alipore Court
matters.description: Title verification and declaratory suit successfully decided in favour of Yashoda confirming legal title of the 4-acre commercial parcel.

matters.title: Yashoda Brands IP Imitator Cease Action
matters.courtOrAuthority: Hon'ble High Court of Calcutta (IP Division)
matters.description: Injunction application filed seeking trademark infringement relief against the imitator using ‘Yashoda’ logo with identical branding fonts for consumer foods.

documents.riskSummary: This document outlines the demand charter from the Trade Union regarding wage revisions, medical coverage increments, and shift allowances. The key conflict point is the retroactive clause requesting salary adjustment dating back to June 2024.

Raw jute sourcing agreement. Section 8 details Force Majeure and Section 14 is the Arbitration clause. High financial risk due to lack of non-performance penalties in case delivery delays do not exceed 30 working days.

Order issued by GST Audit Wing demanding a reversal amount of INR 1.85 Crores along with retrospective 18% p.a. interest. The primary claim revolves around alleged duplicate ITC claims made on structural steels used as plant building columns.
Due diligence report on Rajarhat property parcel confirming clean title, complete chain of mutation documentations from 1985 to present, and zero outstanding mortgage filings with the Sub-Registrar.

notices.senderOrRecipient: Deputy Labour Commissioner Office, West Bengal
notices.description: Notice requesting submission of certified standing orders and employment register roll for checking compliance under Payment of Wages Act.
Demand notice alleging mismatch of interest contribution on temporary contractual weavers for period of April 2024 - September 2024.
Cease and Desist legal notice demanding immediate withdrawal of packaging and branding showing a derivative identical mark of 'Yashoda Organic'.

hearings.matterTitle: Bally Jute Mill ESI Contribution Demand Appeal
hearings.remarks: Ananya Sen to present physical register rosters and verify matching contributions.

hearings.matterTitle: Trade Union Dispute - Wage Restructuring Case
hearings.court: State Industrial Tribunal, Kolkata (Judge B. Roy)
hearings.remarks: Oral arguments from management on feasibility of bonus restructuring.

hearings.matterTitle: Bally Jute Raw Sourcing Agreement Non-Performance Claim
hearings.remarks: Cross-examination of opposing logistics subcontractor witnesses.

hearings.matterTitle: Yashoda Brands IP Imitator Cease Action
hearings.court: Hon'ble High Court of Calcutta (IP Division)
hearings.remarks: Hearing on interim injunction application. Expecting stay on imitator sales.

auditLogs.details: LRLMS multi-tenant repository populated with initial records for Yajur, Bally Jute and Yashoda.
